description_cn: 使一组点共线。共线约束，使多个点保持在同一直线上。将多点拉回至一条拟合的直线上。
description_en: Make a set of points collinear. Collinearity constraints keep multiple points on the same straight line. Pull multiple points back to a fitted straight line.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
